# Dar Mansour - Morocco's Kitchen

> Moroccan slow-food restaurant on the west coast of Koh Phangan, Thailand (Sri Thanu / Hin Kong area). Dinner only, Tuesday to Saturday, reservation recommended. Also publishes The Journal: independent local guides to eating and living on Koh Phangan, plus Moroccan culture.

Founded by Maïja and Bruno. WhatsApp +66 82 276 7757 · hello@darmansour.com.

## The Restaurant

- [Our Menu](https://darmansour.com/moroccan-menu-koh-phangan.html): The full slow-cooked Moroccan menu — tajines, couscous, pastilla and more.
- [Reservations](https://darmansour.com/moroccan-restaurant-reservation-koh-phangan.html): How to book a table or pre-order via WhatsApp (dinner only, Tue–Sat).
- [The Concept](https://darmansour.com/moroccan-slow-dining-koh-phangan.html): Slow food, Moroccan art de vivre and the philosophy behind Dar Mansour.
- [Wine Pairing](https://darmansour.com/moroccan-wine-pairing-koh-phangan.html): Our approach to pairing wine with Moroccan cuisine.
- [Mansour Bar](https://darmansour.com/moroccan-cocktails-koh-phangan.html): Signature cocktails and the bar programme.
- [Private Dining](https://darmansour.com/private-dining-koh-phangan.html): Private events and group dining at Dar Mansour.
- [Founders & Story](https://darmansour.com/dar-mansour-founders-vision.html): Maïja and Bruno, and the story behind the restaurant.
- [Reviews](https://darmansour.com/moroccan-restaurant-reviews-koh-phangan.html): What guests say about dining at Dar Mansour.
- [FAQ](https://darmansour.com/faq.html): Practical questions: hours, booking, location, dietary options.
- [Contact & Location](https://darmansour.com/contact-dar-mansour-koh-phangan.html): Address in the Sri Thanu / Hin Kong area, phone, email and map.

## The Journal (guides & stories)

- [Best Thai Restaurants in Koh Phangan](https://darmansour.com/journal-best-thai-restaurants-koh-phangan.html): Discover the best Thai restaurants in Koh Phangan, from authentic family kitchens and regional Thai cuisine to contemporary Thai dining and local favourites.
- [Best Breakfast & Brunch in Koh Phangan](https://darmansour.com/journal-best-breakfast-brunch-koh-phangan.html): Discover the best breakfast and brunch in Koh Phangan, from specialty coffee and artisan bakeries to healthy cafés, vegan brunches and local favourites.
- [Where to Eat in Hin Kong](https://darmansour.com/journal-where-to-eat-hin-kong.html): Discover where to eat in Hin Kong, Koh Phangan, from authentic Thai restaurants and beachfront seafood to chef-led dining, sunset bars and cocktails.
- [Where to Eat in Sri Thanu](https://darmansour.com/journal-where-to-eat-sri-thanu.html): Discover where to eat in Sri Thanu, Koh Phangan, with authentic Thai restaurants, healthy cafés, specialty coffee, sunset bars and local favourites.
- [Best Restaurants in Koh Phangan: A Local Guide for 2026](https://darmansour.com/journal-best-restaurants-koh-phangan.html): Discover the best restaurants in Koh Phangan, from authentic Thai cuisine and beachfront seafood to brunch, specialty coffee and romantic dining.
- [Best Sunset Spots in Koh Phangan: A Local Guide to the West Coast (2026)](https://darmansour.com/journal-where-to-watch-sunset-koh-phangan.html): Koh Phangan's best sunset spots — from Zen Beach and Hin Kong to Amsterdam Bar and Bluerama, with local tips for a slow evening on the west coast.
- [The Dadas: The Women Who Preserved Morocco's Family Recipes](https://darmansour.com/journal-the-dadas-guardians-of-moroccan-recipes.html): Meet the Dadas, the women who preserved Morocco's family recipes across generations — and whose slow-cooked legacy lives on at Dar Mansour, Koh Phangan.
